text: Here in this space, I am surrounded by reflections, glass, and cool, quiet anticipation. The geometry of the environment makes me mindful and a bit disoriented, as if the ordinary flows of movement and thought are paused by the transparency around me. Entering the second scene, the bold colors and large letters—R + D—confront me with ideas of progress and inquiry. I am intrigued and curious, feeling the pulse of innovation. The contrast between sterile openness and creative display makes me reflect on how spaces shape the mind.
